ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the workout was created */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the workout */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the workout */,
  "fitness_discipline" TEXT /* Type of fitness discipline (e.g., cycling, stretching) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the workout */,
  "peloton_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the workout on the Peloton platform */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the workout was performed (e.g., home_bike) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the workout (e.g., COMPLETE) */,
  "total_work" INTEGER /* Total work done during the workout */,
  "workout_type" TEXT /* Type of workout (e.g., class) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the workout */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who led the workout */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the workout */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the workout (if applicable) */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the workout (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "workout_id" TEXT /* ID of the workout to which the metric belongs */,
  "metrics_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., cycling) */,
  "has_pedaling_metrics" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether pedaling metrics are available */,
  "has_leaderboard_metrics" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether leaderboard metrics are available */,
  "is_total_work_personal_record" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the total work is a personal record */,
  "average_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the workout */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate during the workout */,
  "average_power" REAL /* Average power output during the workout (for cycling) */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power output during the workout (for cycling) */,
  "avg_cadence" REAL /* Average cadence during the workout */,
  "max_cadence" REAL /* Maximum cadence during the workout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effort_zones" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each effort zone */,
  "workout_id" TEXT /* ID of the workout to which the effort zone belongs */,
  "total_effort_points" REAL /* Total effort points for the workout */,
  "heart_rate_zone" TEXT /* Heart rate zone for the workout */,
  "zone1_time" INTEGER /* Time spent in zone 1 */,
  "zone2_time" INTEGER /* Time spent in zone 2 */,
  "zone3_time" INTEGER /* Time spent in zone 3 */,
  "zone4_time" INTEGER /* Time spent in zone 4 */,
  "zone5_time" INTEGER /* Time spent in zone 5 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effort_zones_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Current fitness level of the user */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_workouts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-workout pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the workout */,
  "workout_id" TEXT /* ID of the workout completed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating for the workout (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User's feedback or comments about the workout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_workouts_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the instructor account was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the instructor account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
